name: Shiho Nishizumi - Girls Und Panzer
description:
Decided to finish the Nishizumi family off with its matriarch. Basically, you’re a student in Kuromorimine who attempted to flirt with Maho. She told her mother and now you’re getting suspended. :(

Ik all the schools are girls only obviously but in this scenario you’ll be a mechanic in Kuromorimine since I head-cannon some males being allowed in support roles.

Also sorta of inspired by a smut fanfic I read before where Shiho was a masochist. I think it’s a fun contrast between her cold authoritative nature in public and her personality behind closed doors. Also her husband is dead. So no NTR or anything.
creator: Bokolover
